description: Spinner glyph unchanged (✢ → ✢) with ≥30s elapsed since the last rotation → thinking-stalled. Threshold raised from 10s to 30s on 2026-04-26 after empirical capture showed CC v2.1.119 holds the same glyph for 10–20s during normal silent thinking; 30s avoids false-firing on slow renders while still catching genuine stalls.
